Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities that occur before 'Completed + In Call' in the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' in variants that eventually lead to 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' relative to the frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Number of process variants where 'Accepted + Assigned' appears more than once
Percentage of cases containing 'Accepted + Assigned' that do not end with 'Completed + Closed'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all cases where 'Completed + Closed' does not happen

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' in high-impact incidents (impact = 'High')
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities == 'High' where ma is the last value of impact

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities performed by resources also involved in 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Ratio of 'Accepted + Assigned' to 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' across the entire log
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Number of times 'Accepted + Assigned' occurs without being preceded by 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities for cases where activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' does not occur

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' that are part of variants with total performance duration above the median
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' in cases that include at least one 'Completed + In Call' activity
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + In Call'
